title: Business Operations Specialist
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Position: Business Operations Specialist

Work Schedule: US Hours (EST)

Employment Set-up: Remote (Independent Contractor)  

Employment Type: Full-Time / Long Term

Salary Range: USD 1,000 - 1,500 / Month

Benefit: Unlimited PTO and HMO after the probationary period

Pay-out Frequency: Semi-monthly

Equipment: Self-Provide



Job Summary:



Wingz are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Business Operations Specialist to support daily operations and key initiatives within our growing healthcare transportation company. This role works closely with leadership to help ensure operational efficiency, support strategic initiatives, and assist with managing business contracts and vendor agreements.



The ideal candidate has experience working with business contracts, service agreements, and vendor partnerships, and is comfortable coordinating across teams to ensure contractual obligations and operational requirements are met.



Key Responsibilities:



Operations Support

• Assist leadership with daily operational coordination and business priorities.

• Monitor workflows and support improvements to operational processes.

• Maintain operational documentation, reports, and internal procedures.



Contract & Vendor Coordination

• Assist in reviewing and tracking business contracts, vendor agreements, and service-level commitments.

• Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to ensure contract terms and deliverables are met.

• Maintain organized records of contracts, agreements, and related documentation.

• Support leadership in preparing or updating operational agreements and vendor arrangements.



Client & Partner Relations

• Support communication with partners and clients regarding operational matters tied to service agreements.

• Help address operational issues while ensuring alignment with contract terms.

• Maintain strong working relationships with vendors, partners, and internal teams.



Strategic & Business Support

• Assist leadership with operational reporting and performance tracking.

• Support projects related to business growth, partnerships, and operational improvements.

• Help identify operational risks or inefficiencies related to contracts and service delivery.



Process Improvement

• Recommend improvements to operational workflows related to contract management and vendor coordination.

• Assist with implementing tools or processes that improve contract tracking and operational transparency.



Requirements:

• At least 3 years of experience in operations, business support, contract coordination, or a similar role.

• Experience working with business contracts, service agreements, or vendor contracts.

• Strong organizational and documentation management skills.

• Excellent written and verbal English communication.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.

• High attention to detail when handling agreements and operational requirements.



Preferred Experience

• Experience supporting operations, partnerships, or vendor management.

• Background in logistics, transportation, healthcare operations, or service-based businesses.

• Familiarity with contract documentation, service-level agreements (SLAs), and vendor coordination.

• Experience working with remote teams and operational tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, CRM, or project management systems.

title: Bidding Specialist VA — Luxury Construction (Architectural Plaster)
description:
About Us

Architectural Plaster is a high-end specialty plastering and stucco company based in the Coachella Valley, California. We work with architects, interior designers, and luxury residential developers delivering custom plaster and stucco finishes that require serious craftsmanship. We’re a professional, tight-knit team that takes care of our people and our clients. We’re growing rapidly and need the right person to help us capture more of that growth.





The Role

We’re hiring a part-time Bidding Specialist VA to manage our bid pipeline, monitor project opportunities, and submit professional proposals on our behalf. You’ll work directly with the owner and in close coordination with our Outbound Sales VA to make sure no opportunity slips through the cracks.

You’ll start at 10–20 hours per week with strong potential to grow as our pipeline expands — which it will, because we’re actively building our outbound sales operation in parallel.





What You’ll Be Doing

 • Monitoring bid platforms and project lead sources daily for relevant opportunities in our service area and specialty

 • Reviewing incoming bid opportunities and flagging those that match our project profile — luxury residential, high-end commercial, specialty plaster and stucco finishes

 • Building and submitting complete, accurate proposals using Joist — our primary bid and CRM platform (experience with Joist or ability to learn it quickly is required)

 • Ensuring all proposals go out on time, are formatted professionally, and reflect the scope of work accurately

 • Following up on submitted bids at appropriate intervals and tracking decision timelines

 • Maintaining a live bid tracker showing all active proposals, submission dates, expected award dates, and outcomes

 • Coordinating closely with our Outbound Sales VA — sharing intel on new contacts from bid platforms and aligning on accounts where both outreach and a formal bid are in play

 • Flagging any high-value or time-sensitive opportunity to the owner immediately for review before submission

 • Logging all bid activity and contacts into our shared CRM so both the owner and the sales VA have full visibility





You’re the Right Fit If You…

 • Are extremely detail-oriented — errors in proposals cost us jobs

 • Can manage multiple open bids simultaneously without dropping the ball

 • Are comfortable working in Joist or can demonstrate you’ll learn it fast

 • Communicate proactively — you flag issues before they become problems

 • Have experience in construction, contracting, or specialty trades bid management (a strong plus)

 • Are organized, self-directed, and consistent — you don’t need to be chased

 • Write clearly and professionally in English





Important — How Bids Are Approved

All proposals go through owner review before submission. Your job is to build the bid accurately and completely so the owner can approve and send quickly. You will never submit a proposal without owner sign-off. This keeps our quality consistent and our relationships protected.



After a time period of proven accuracy and full understanding of operations, this process may change and you will take full ownership of sending bids for Architectural Plaster, LLC.





Details

 • Hours: 10–20 hours per week to start, with strong potential to grow

 • Rate: $5.50–$7.00/hour depending on experience

 • Schedule: Flexible, but must be responsive during US business hours for time-sensitive bids

 • Location: Remote / Work from home





How to Apply

Please submit your application with the following:

 1. Your updated resume or profile

 2. A 2-minute video introduction answering this question: “Describe a time you managed multiple deadlines or competing priorities at once — what was your system and how did it work?”

Applications without a video submission will not be reviewed. We want to see that you’re organized, professional, and that you actually read this posting. That person gets the job.

title: Remote Truck Dispatch & Operations Coordinator (Canada & USA Lanes)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and experienced Remote Truck Dispatch & Operations Coordinator for a full-time long-term role.



The ideal candidate should have previous experience in trucking, dispatch, or logistics operations involving Canada and USA lanes. We strongly prefer someone with hands-on experience working with transportation or logistics companies serving Ontario, Quebec, and USA routes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Manage day-to-day dispatch and operations for trucking movements

- Coordinate loads, drivers, schedules, and route planning

- Monitor shipments and ensure smooth communication between drivers, brokers, and internal teams

- Follow up on pickup and delivery appointments

- Handle updates, delays, and operational issues in a timely manner

- Maintain accurate records and provide regular status updates

- Support dispatch planning for Canada and USA lanes

- Communicate professionally with carriers, drivers, brokers, and customers



Requirements:

- Previous experience in truck dispatch, freight dispatch, or logistics operations

- Experience working with Canada and/or USA trucking companies is highly preferred

- Familiarity with Ontario, Quebec, and USA lanes is a strong advantage

- Good English communication skills, both written and verbal

- Strong organizational and problem-solving skills

- Ability to work independently in a remote setup

- Comfortable working full-time based on North American business hours

- Stable internet connection and reliable work-from-home setup



Preferred:

- Experience with load boards, dispatch systems, TMS, or freight operations tools

- Background in logistics, supply chain, trucking, or transportation operations

- Ability to multitask and handle time-sensitive operational work



Compensation:

Negotiable and based on experience.



This is a long-term remote opportunity for someone who understands trucking operations and can support dispatch activities efficiently and professionally.

title: SEO & Content Optimization Assistant (AI-Assisted)
description:
We are a fast-growing UK women's fashion brand selling on Shopify with Google Shopping ads. We have 1,000+ products and are looking for an SEO-savvy assistant to help optimise our product pages for search and Google Shopping performance.

You'll work directly with an AI tool (Claude) alongside clear SOPs to audit and rewrite product titles, meta descriptions, product descriptions, image alt texts, and URL slugs across our entire catalogue. Unlike a purely copy-paste role, we expect you to apply your SEO judgment to review, refine, and improve AI-generated suggestions before publishing.



What You'll Do:

- Review existing product pages on our Shopify store for SEO gaps

- Use Claude (AI) to generate optimised titles, descriptions, and alt texts — then apply your SEO knowledge to validate and refine them

- Copy and implement optimised content accurately into Shopify's product editor

- Update image alt texts one by one across each product

- Flag products with issues such as keyword stuffing, thin content, factual errors, or missing information

- Work through a prioritised product list systematically, tracking progress as you go

- Follow provided SOPs from day one — full training included



What a Typical Session Looks Like:

Open a product in Shopify ? share the URL or screenshot with Claude ? receive SEO-optimised content suggestions ? review and refine using your SEO knowledge ? apply directly into Shopify. Repeat. Methodical, focused work with clear outputs every session.

title: Home Care Scheduler Role
description:
Job Title

Remote Caregiver Scheduler – U.S. Home Care Agency



Phone-Based Scheduling Role – Must Be Comfortable Calling Caregivers



Remote | Philippines | Supporting U.S. Operations



Position Overview

A U.S.-based home care agency is seeking a remote scheduler located in the Philippines to coordinate caregiver shifts and maintain reliable service coverage for clients.



This role is responsible for managing caregiver schedules, responding to call-outs, confirming coverage, and communicating with caregivers and internal staff to ensure shifts are filled and services occur as scheduled.



The scheduler must be comfortable working in U.S. time zones, communicating frequently by phone and messaging, and resolving scheduling issues quickly and professionally.



This role requires strong attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and the ability to manage multiple scheduling priorities simultaneously.



Important About This Role

Home care scheduling is a fast-moving operations role.



Caregivers sometimes call out unexpectedly, and clients must still receive care. The scheduler must be comfortable making phone calls, solving coverage problems quickly, and communicating clearly with caregivers and the operations team.



This role is best suited for someone who enjoys problem-solving, coordinating people, and keeping operations running smoothly.



Core Responsibilities

Caregiver Scheduling

Schedule caregivers for client shifts according to care plans



Maintain caregiver availability records



Assign shifts based on qualifications and availability



Confirm caregiver shift assignments



Call-Out and Coverage Management

Respond to caregiver call-outs



Identify replacement caregivers quickly



Coordinate shift coverage with available staff



Update schedule changes in the system



Caregiver Communication

Contact caregivers to confirm upcoming shifts



Notify caregivers of schedule changes



Follow up on missed confirmations



Maintain professional communication with staff



Documentation and Scheduling Records

Record schedule updates and coverage changes



Maintain accurate scheduling records



Document communication with caregivers regarding scheduling issues



Coordination with Internal Staff

Communicate scheduling issues to operations team



Flag coverage risks or staffing shortages



Assist with caregiver availability updates



Required Qualifications

Fluent spoken and written English



Experience working remotely with U.S. teams



Experience with scheduling, dispatch, or coordination roles



Comfortable making phone calls and communicating with staff



Strong organizational and time management skills



Ability to handle urgent scheduling changes calmly



Preferred Experience

Candidates with experience in the following areas are strongly preferred:



Home care scheduling



Healthcare staffing coordination



Dispatch or logistics scheduling



Medical virtual assistant roles



Experience with scheduling systems such as:



AxisCare



ClearCare / WellSky



AlayaCare



Similar platforms



Work Schedule

Must be available to work during U.S. daytime hours or overlapping hours with U.S. operations.



Compensation

$700 – $1,000 USD per month



Compensation depends on scheduling experience and familiarity with U.S. operations.



Key Performance Expectations

Success in this role is measured by:



Metric Target

Shift coverage All shifts confirmed and staffed

Response time to call-outs < 15 minutes

Schedule accuracy Minimal errors

Communication responsiveness Immediate acknowledgement of scheduling issues



Attach your resume link.

title: Direct Response Video Editor | DTC Supplements
description:
We're a DTC supplement brand scaling through direct response video ads on Meta. We need an editor who thinks in hook rates, hold times, and conversions.



Strong creative instincts, a performance mindset, and fluency with AI tools are baseline.



What You’ll Be Creating

- Short-form paid ads (30s–1:30s) that feel native to Reels, and Shorts

- UGC-style ads with multiple hook variations to maximize performance

- Mini VSLs (1–4 mins) with clean pacing, emotional storytelling, and B-roll flow

- Performance iterations based on real ad data, not guesswork

- Trend-inspired edits that ride platform culture while staying brand-aligned



AI & Tools (Important)

- Comfortable using AI tools to support creative production and ideation

- Experience with tools like Kling, Veo 3, Nano Banana, Sora, or similar AI video tools is a strong plus

- Able to use AI for B-roll generation, concept testing, visual enhancements, or creative experimentation



Weekly Output & Expectations

- Deliver 6 briefs per week (quality over quantity)

- Proactively iterate based on ad performance data & strategist feedback

- Stay on top of TikTok/IG trends and bring fresh creative ideas to the table



You’re a Good Fit If You

- Have proven experience editing direct response ads that convert

- Understand key ad metrics (hook rate, watch time, CTR) and how edits affect them

- Know how to make videos feel native to social media paltforms

- Are detail-oriented, reliable, and fast without sacrificing quality



Compensation & Growth

$1,400 – $1,500/month (depending on experience)

Performance bonuses for winning creatives

Clear growth path into Lead Editor / Creative Strategist

Fully remote – flexible schedule, results over hours



How to Apply

Include your portfolio (short-form ads only — UGC or paid social preferred).

Bonus if you share results (metrics, ROAS, CTR improvements) from ads you’ve edited.



To confirm you read this fully, start your application with “HOOK”



We’re building a performance-focused creative team.



If you’re consistent, creative, and serious about improving ad results, we’d like to see your work.

title: Social Media Marketing Manager (SMMM)

title: VIDEO APPLICATION REQUIRED: Amazon Private Label Listing DesigProfessional PPC Manager for Amazon Private Label Projects
description:

I am an Agency owner from Germany and mostly operating over the Globe. German Market, US Market and UK are the priorities.



I am looking for a PPC Manager who "REALLY" have good experience and can handle campaigns strategically and bring it to a good ROAD and ACOS level. 



As I am doing it myself at the 
nt, I am looking for assistance to take that job fro

title: LORA Image Gnerator
description:
Roles Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled AI Image Creator & LoRA Specialist to spearhead our visual identity on TikTok. The primary focus of this role is to develop and maintain consistent character faces across diverse environments, outfits, and poses.



You will be the architect of our digital "brand ambassadors," ensuring that our AI-generated influencers look identical in every frame, which is critical for building trust and recognition in short-form video promotions.



Key Responsibilities

LoRA Training: Develop, test, and refine high-quality LoRAs (Low-Rank Adaptations) specifically for facial consistency.



Workflow Integration: Utilize the Nano Banana ecosystem to generate high-fidelity assets optimized for social media engagement.



Character Continuity: Ensure the "virtual human" maintains anatomical and facial integrity across different seeds, lighting conditions, and camera angles.



Content Production: Generate a high volume of images for TikTok slideshows, video overlays, and promotional marketing materials.



Prompt Engineering: Master complex prompting to place our consistent characters in trending TikTok scenarios without losing their identity.



Post-Processing: Use Inpainting, ControlNet, and Upscaling techniques to Polish images for high-definition mobile viewing.



Required Skills & Qualifications

Deep Technical Knowledge: Proven experience training LoRAs (via Kohya_ss, OneTrainer, or similar) specifically for faces/people.



Nano Banana Proficiency: Demonstrated ability to navigate the Nano Banana platform/tools to achieve specific artistic outputs.



Stable Diffusion Mastery: Expert-level understanding of Checkpoints, VAEs, and the various Sampling methods.



Facial Restoration Expertise: Skilled in using tools like Adtailer or Reactor to maintain facial features at different scales.



Eye for Viral Aesthetics: A strong understanding of TikTok trends, lighting, and "scroll-stopping" visual styles.



Preferred Tools

AI Stack: Stable Diffusion (A1111, Forge, or ComfyUI), Nano Banana, Flux.1 (if applicable).



Editing: Adobe Photoshop or Canva (for asset cleanup).



Video: CapCut or Premiere Pro (knowledge of how to transition AI images into video is a huge plus).

title: Remote MYOB Bookkeeper & Operations VA - Sydney Pizza Shop
description:
Solo owner of a busy Sydney pizza franchise store. Need an experienced MYOB specialist to verify/optimize automated invoices (via new EzzyBills integration), handle weekly payroll/prep, provide real financial visibility (P&L trends, costs vs. revenue), chase suppliers/accountant, build simple processes/dashboards, and support local growth outreach. Remote, part-time ~20 hours/week (Australian hours overlap required).



MYOB & EzzyBills Verification



Review/fix auto-imported bills in MYOB, correct errors or mismatches.

Enter any non-auto items, reconcile bank/POS to bills (handle credits, wrong invoice numbers, mispayments).

Liaise with accountant on MYOB issues (share reports, clarify entries).



Payroll & Payments Prep

Track supplier invoices, prepare payment lists/schedules (owner approves and executes all payments).



Financial Visibility & Reporting

Build simple dashboards/tools (Google Sheets + MYOB exports) for weekly/monthly insights: revenue vs. costs, margins, expense trends.

Prepare monthly P&L with commentary; weekly summary reports + DSR compilation.

Monitor cashflow and flag issues (e.g., rising costs).



Compliance & Reminders

Set reminders for ATO deadlines (BAS/GST, super obligations).

Support payroll and small business compliance.



Processes & Local Growth

Document internal shop processes/SOPs (based on owner input) for operations and finance clarity.

Local marketing support: Schedule/share approved brand posts in
 groups (on permitted days/times); research and reach out to local schools (P&Cs), businesses for catering opportunities (draft
s, follow-ups).

Chase franchise HQ for store-specific marketing or support items as needed.





Requirements – Must-Haves



Proven experience with MYOB Business (Connected Ledger with Payroll preferred; recent Australian clients).

Hospitality/food/franchise background (especially P&Ls, cost tracking, process documentation).

Strong knowledge of Australian small business compliance (GST, BAS, STP, superannuation, PAYG).

2+ years as bookkeeper/VA hybrid; clear English for accountant liaison and professional outreach.

Proficient in Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Drive), Outlook, MYOB.

Bonus: Experience with EzzyBills or similar invoice automation; marketing/outreach skills.

Proactive, detail-oriented, trustworthy; reliable internet and availability during Sydney business hours.



What We Offer



Rate: ?196 per hour-?370 per hour

~20 hours/week to start; supportive environment with clear guidelines and regular check-ins (Zoom)

- Small business - opportunity to be a part of something new and add your own touch. 



Screening questions (please answer as part of application with specific examples from real Australian clients. Include challenges you faced, tools used, exact steps where relevant, and measurable results. Generic answers will not be considered.





1)Describe a specific time you set up, troubleshot, or optimised the EzzyBills integration with MYOB Business (Connected Ledger) for an Australian client. What were the biggest issues. Walk us through the exact steps you took to fix them and the result (e.g., time saved, error rate reduced, or how it affected the client’s cashflow).



(If you haven’t used EzzyBills, describe your experience with a similar automation tool like Hubdoc/Dext and the reconciliation challenges you’ve solved.)



2)Have you worked with Australian hospitality or franchise businesses (restaurants, cafés, takeaways, or similar)? Give one detailed example of how you handled GST on food/supplier invoices, BAS preparation, STP payroll, superannuation, or PAYG for them. Include a specific time you spotted a compliance risk or error and liaised with the client’s accountant or the ATO to resolve it — what was the issue and what was the outcome?





3)Give a concrete example of how you helped a business owner (ideally in hospitality or food service) get better visibility into their numbers. What weekly or monthly reports/dashboards did you build? What key insights did you uncover? What was the measurable result for the owner?





4)Describe a time you proactively identified and fixed a financial or operational issue for a client before it became a crisis. What was the issue, how did you fix it, and what impact did it have? 





5)PLEASE confirm you can reliably work ~20 hours/week during Sydney business hours (9 AM–5 PM AEDT).



6)The role includes documenting simple SOPs and helping with local growth (e.g., scheduling approved
 group posts on permitted days, researching/reaching out to local schools or businesses for catering, drafting professional
s/follow-ups, or chasing franchise HQ). Describe any relevant experience you have with process documentation or B2B outreach for small businesses. Give one specific example of an outreach or follow-up you handled and the outcome.

title: Order & Fulfillment Coordinator (Part-Time, Flexible | Start ±1 hour/day)
description:
About the role



We are looking for an Order & Fulfillment Coordinator to monitor daily orders, track shipments, perform quality-control checks, and resolve delivery issues with our China fulfillment partner. Your main goal is simple: improve customer satisfaction by preventing problems before they reach the customer.



This is a flexible, part-time role starting at around 1 hour per day. As volume grows, hours can increase.



Key responsibilities



Daily order monitoring: Check new orders, fulfillment status, and exceptions.



Shipment tracking & control: Monitor shipments via Parcel Panel and ensure tracking is moving and accurate.



Quality checks (QC): Verify order details (variant, size, color), address details, and packaging/shipping progress to reduce mistakes.



Exception handling: Solve issues such as:



delayed/stuck tracking



wrong/duplicate tracking numbers



address issues / undeliverable shipments



damaged/incorrect items (coordinate evidence & solution)



China partner communication: Follow up clearly and consistently with the fulfillment team in China to keep orders moving.



Progress control: Maintain a clean overview of daily status and action points in Google Sheets.



Customer satisfaction improvements: Identify recurring problems and propose process fixes (SOP/checklist improvements).



Tools & workflow



Slack (daily communication)



Google Sheets (tracking dashboards, daily reports, SOP checklists)



Parcel Panel (tracking & status monitoring)



Shopify (order status and basic checks)



What we are looking for



Strong communication skills (you must be comfortable pushing for clear answers with a China fulfillment team).



Very organized and detail-oriented (you like checklists and clean tracking sheets).



Proactive mindset: you flag problems early instead of reacting late.



Basic understanding of e-commerce operations (fulfillment, tracking, delivery flow).



Reliable and consistent: you show up daily, even if it is only 1 hour.



Success metrics (KPI examples)



Fewer “Where is my order?” complaints (WISMO)



Lower % of orders with tracking issues after 48 hours



Faster resolution time for delayed/stuck shipments



Fewer fulfillment mistakes (wrong item/variant/size)



Higher customer satisfaction/positive feedback rate



Working hours & compensation



Flexible schedule (as long as tasks are completed daily)



Starting around 1 hour/day, with option to scale up



Compensation: competitive (based on experience) + growth opportunities



How to apply



Send:



A short intro



Relevant experience (e-commerce ops, tracking, customer ops, fulfillment)



Your availability (time zone + general daily window)



A brief example of how you would handle a “tracking stuck for 7 days” case

title: Operations and Compliance Coordinator
description:
We are a US-based marine services company managing private yachts for high-net-worth owners. Our small remote team has been hiring through OnlineJobs.ph for three years and our longest-serving tea
mber is approaching her three-year anniversary. We observe Filipino holidays, pay 13th month, provide healthcare, and treat our team as long-term partners.



We are creating a new Vessel Operations and Compliance Coordinator role to take administrative ownership of vessel compliance, crew documents, insurance, payroll compliance, and refit paperwork across our fleet. We run a cloud-based vessel management system as the operational backbone, supported by Google Workspace and Asana. 



You will speak to captains, brokers, vendors, and our payroll provider regularly by phone,
, and video. You will keep our document repository clean, track every certificate expiry, run our captain compliance inbox, and chase the people who owe us paperwork until they deliver.



You will own:



Vessel compliance documents, certificate calendar (CoR, class, insurance, MLC), flag state correspondence, and audit prep packages



Crew documents and onboarding/offboarding coordination with our outsourced payroll provider



Insurance renewal admin, broker call scheduling, and vessel data gathering for RFQs



Refit and project paperwork (vendor quotes, POs, work list tracking)



Captain compliance inbox: monthly PMS submissions, document uploads, and document repository hygiene



New customer setup checklist execution



Asana ownership for the vessel operations project



This is a full-time role on US East Coast hours (9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern, Monday to Friday). We are not looking for someone juggling multiple clients. This is not a decision-making role. The Principal makes all calls on compliance, insurance, refits, and crew. Your job is to make sure the right paperwork is in the right place at the right time.

Excellent attention to detail

title: Experienced Appointment Setter (Cold Calling) – SEO Agency | Australian Clients

We are looking for a confident, professional, and results-driven Appointment Setter to join our team. Your primary job is to make outbound cold calls to Australian business owners, introduce our SEO services, and book qualified appointments for our sales team.

Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM AEST (Australian Eastern Standard Time)



???? COMPENSATION

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

 Base pay: $4–$6 AUD per hour (depending on experience)

• Bonus: $35 AUD per Converted appointment

title: SEO Assistant - Remote
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented and proactive SEO Specialist to join our growing team at Pixite. This is a fully remote role, ideal for someone experienced in backlinks, local SEO, and content optimisation who enjoys working within structured systems and processes.



About the Role:

You’ll play a key role in improving our clients’ search visibility through high-quality backlink building, Google Business Profile optimisation, and ongoing SEO analysis. You’ll work closely with our internal team and follow established workflows using tools like Productive and Notion.



Key Responsibilities: 

	•	Build high-quality backlinks and citations across reputable websites

	•	Apply SEO best practices when creating Google Business Profile (GBP) posts, including strategic keyword usage

	•	Design and publish weekly Google Business posts and graphics using Canva

	•	Create and submit articles through article submission platforms and other content opportunities

	•	Monitor and analyse monthly website performance using SEMrush

	•	Conduct keyword research to identify growth opportunities and improve rankings

	•	Perform monthly SEO health checks on client websites and implement necessary optimisations

	•	Adapt to team workflows, templates, and evolving processes within Productive, Notion, and other tools



Requirements:

	•	Proven experience in SEO, particularly backlink building and local SEO

	•	Strong understanding of keyword research and on-page SEO fundamentals

	•	Familiarity with tools like SEMrush (or similar platforms)

	•	Experience designing simple graphics in Canva

	•	High attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes

	•	Strong communication and ability to work independently in a remote team



Why Join Us?

	•	Work with a fast-growing digital agency based in Australia

	•	Clear systems and processes to support your work

	•	Opportunity to grow your SEO skillset across multiple client industries



If you’re passionate about SEO and ready to make an impact, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Video Editor (Shortform)
description:
We're looking for a project-based video editor to produce performance-driven ads for local service businesses across multiple niches. This is a remote, execution-only role, no client contact, just clean delivery.



You'll be editing two types of ads. The first is UGC-style, where a business owner or spokesperson is on camera and your job is to make it punchy, authentic, and attention-grabbing from the first second. The second is faceless project showcase ads, built from photos and videos of completed work, combined with AI-generated visuals, captions, music, and motion graphics to tell a compelling story.



Raw footage will be provided, but you'll also be expected to source or generate additional assets using AI tools and research online. Hands-on experience with tools like Higgsfield, Runway, Kling, Pika, and ElevenLabs is required. If you haven't used these, this role isn't the right fit.



You should be proficient in your editing software of choice, whether that's Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut Pro, or similar. 



Strong captions, audio cleanup, colour grading, and basic motion graphics are all expected.



Volume is 20 to 30 reels per month at $15 to $25 per completed reel depending on experience and complexity. 



Each video must be delivered within 48 hours of receiving footage, with a maximum of 2 revision rounds. Files are delivered to Google Drive following a provided folder structure and naming convention.



You must be able to work independently, manage your own time, and flag any issues before a deadline — not after.

title: EXPERIENCED SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexi Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflow

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Senior Para Broker / Credit Analyst – Australian Mortgage Broking
description:
Para Broker / Credit Analyst

Australian Mortgage Broking – Complex & Medical Lending

Applicants must have minimum 3 years experience analysing Australian mortgage lending scenarios.



Full-Time | Permanent | Work From Home

Salary: 70,000 – 100,000 PHP per month depending on experience



This Role Is For a Real Credit Analyst — Not a Broker Admin



We are an established Australian mortgage brokerage specialising in lending for medical professionals and complex borrowers. Our work regularly involves residential, investment, commercial, SMSF, trust structures, and high-net-worth lending.



We are looking for a genuinely experienced Para Broker or Credit Analyst who understands how to structure lending, interpret credit policy, and produce strong lender-ready applications.



This role is not suitable for applicants whose experience is primarily document collection, CRM updates, application submission only, or broker administration.



If your previous role mainly involved preparing files for submission or acting as broker support, this position will not be the right fit.



The Type of Analyst We Are Looking For



You are someone who can think like a lender, not just process paperwork.



You have experience assessing borrowing capacity and servicing, identifying suitable lenders based on credit policy, structuring deals involving trusts, SMSF or commercial borrowers, and preparing clear credit submissions that help lenders approve deals.



You enjoy solving problems and working on lending scenarios where every file is different.



Mandatory Experience Requirements



Please only apply if you meet all of the following requirements.



You must have at least 3 years experience as a Para Broker or Credit Analyst in Australian mortgage broking.



You must have experience analysing and structuring residential and investment lending.



Exposure to commercial lending, trust lending or SMSF lending is highly desirable.



You must have strong knowledge of Australian lender credit policy and excellent written and spoken English.



You must also have experience using the following platforms:



ApplyOnline (AOL)

Mercury CRM

Quickli



If you are unfamiliar with these systems, you are not qualified for this role.



What You Will Be Doing



Analysing client financials and servicing positions



Researching lender credit policy and structuring lending solutions



Recommending lenders and loan strategies to brokers



Preparing high quality credit submissions



Assisting with complex lending scenarios including SMSF and trust structures



Supporting files through to approval and settlement



You will work closely with experienced brokers who handle complex transactions, so your work will directly influence deal outcomes.



Why This Role Is Different



Many offshore roles in mortgage broking are administrative.



This role is not.



You will be working with brokers who specialise in complex and high-value lending, including medical professional lending, SMSF lending, trust lending, commercial lending, and high-net-worth borrowers.



We value intelligence, initiative, strong analytical ability and attention to detail.



If you enjoy working on challenging deals and learning advanced lending strategy, you will thrive in this environment.



What We Offer



Permanent full-time work from home role



Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm AEST



Salary between 70,000 and 100,000 PHP depending on experience



A small experienced team of high-performing brokers and analysts



Exposure to complex lending scenarios most analysts never see



We are building a long-term team and are looking for someone who wants to grow with the business.



Application Instructions (Important)



Please do not send a CV only.



Applications without the following will not be reviewed.



Record a short video introduction (2 to 4 minutes) where you:



Explain your experience as a Credit Analyst or Para Broker



Describe the types of lending scenarios you have worked on



Explain how your role differed from broker administration or loan processing



Demonstrate your spoken English communication



Upload the video to Google Drive or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application.



Failure to follow these instructions will result in automatic rejection as attention to detail is critical in this role.



If you are an experienced credit analyst who enjoys problem-solving, complex lending structures and working with high-performing professionals, we would like to hear from you.

title: Duda Website Designer (Ad Hoc / Ongoing)
description:
We're a small Australian SEO agency that manages websites for local service-based businesses. We're looking for a skilled Duda website designer for ongoing, ad hoc work.

This is not a copy-paste role. We need someone who genuinely understands Duda at an expert level and has the design eye to go with it. When adding new pages or uploading content, we need you to look at the existing site and make sure everything looks like it belongs there. If the new content is slightly different in length or structure to existing pages, we need you to adjust the layout so it still looks clean, uniform, and professional. Not just slap it in and move on.

What you'll be doing:



Adding new pages and blog posts to client websites built on Duda

Uploading and formatting written content so it looks native to the existing design

Making minor layout adjustments as needed to keep pages looking tidy and consistent

Flagging anything that looks off before submitting work



What we need from you:



Expert-level Duda skills, you know it inside and out

A genuine design eye, you can look at a page and tell if something is off

Attention to detail and pride in your work

Availability for approximately 5 to 10 hours per week (recurring)

Fast communication, you must respond to messages within 24 hours. If we can't get hold of you easily when tasks come in, this won't work



Experience required:



Proven experience building and editing websites in Duda

Portfolio or examples of Duda work strongly preferred

WordPress or other website builder coding (html/CSS) experience is a bonus (and would be awesome!)



This is recurring work for the right person. We want someone reliable we can build a long-term working relationship with.

title: Customer Experience Professional Superstar
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Customer Experience Professional Superstars this role will emphasize in building and maintaining strong long term relationships with our customers. The ideal candidate will possess excellent communication skills, a positive attitude and a passion for ensuring customer satisfaction while fostering loyalty and trust.



Key Responsibilities:

* Talk to customers everyday: Answer messages,
s, or calls from customers. Helping them with questions about orders, product and services

* Solve customer problems: Customer issues such as wrong items, delay, and complaint. Find out what happened and find a resolution quickly. Keep the customer updated until the issue is resolved.

* Follow-up with customers: Check in with customers after purchase to make sure they are happy. Ask for feedback and note any concerns

* Keep customers satisfied: Handle complaints calmly and professionally. Offer the best solution to make the customer happy

* Collect and share feedback: Record customers comments. Complaints and suggestions. Report common issues or trend to the team so improvements can be made

* Work with other teams: Coordinate with the logistics team, warehouse and sales team when needed

* Update Records: Log all customer interactions, issues, and actions taken in the CRM



About you:



* Can work independently with little supervision and learn new tools quickly

* Pays close attention to details and can identify the root cause of issues

* Stays calm and makes good decisions under pressure

* Manages time well and can handle multiple customers at once

* Flexible and open to changes in tasks, tools, or priorities

* Communicates clearly and confidently, including giving feedback to managers

* Experience with Australian furniture companies is a strong advantage

* Solid background in the e-commerce and retail industry



Qualifications:



* Proven experience in customer service, relationship management, or a similar role

* Excellent communication skills (both verbal and written)

* Strong interpersonal skills, empathy and intelligence, with an ability to build rapport with customers and internal teams

* Ability to handle difficult or sensitive situations with tact and professionalism

* Problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically and creatively

* Familiarity with CRM systems and other customer service software

* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

* Ability to work independently and as part of a team





What we offer



* Salary offered: Php 40,000 - 45,000/month (Flexibility to increase for Genuine Superstars)

* “13th month” performance based bonus paid in December

* Annual performance and salary review every June

* HMO with an additional dependent

* 10 days Vacation leave

* 5 days Sick leave

* 3 days additional PTO (Christmas day, New Year’s day, & Good Friday)

* Full-time day shift (9:00 am to 6:00 pm - Australian Eastern Daylight Time (AEDT))

* Permanent work from home set-up





Home office requirements:

iCore 3 or it's equivalent with 8GB Ram

Internet speed should a minimum and stable 50mbps





ONLY SHORT-LISTED CANDIDATES WILL BE CONTACTED





For interested applicants, kindly fill out the application form:

title: Interior Designer
description:
Job Title: Interior Designer

 FF&E (Furniture, Fixtures, and Equipment) 



Job Summary:

We're seeking an experienced FF&E Interior Designer to join our team, responsible for selecting and procuring furniture, fixtures, and equipment for various projects. The ideal candidate will have a keen eye for design, excellent project management skills, and the ability to find alternative options for furniture and materials.



Responsibilities:

- Collaborate with design teams to develop FF&E concepts and specifications

- Research and source furniture, fixtures, and equipment from vendors and suppliers

- Identify and propose alternative options for furniture and materials

- Coordinate with vendors, contractors, and clients to ensure project completion

- Develop and maintain FF&E budgets and timelines

- Ensure compliance with design specifications, quality standards, and regulatory requirements



Requirements:

- Bachelor's degree in Interior Design or related field

- 3+ years of experience in FF&E design and procurement

- Strong knowledge of furniture, fixtures, and equipment

- Excellent communication and project management skills

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team

- Proficiency in design software (e.g., AutoCAD, SketchUp)



Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience with procurement processes and vendor management

- Knowledge of industry standards and best practices

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary and benefits package

- Opportunities for professional growth and development

- Collaborative and dynamic work environment



If you're a creative and detail-oriented FF&E Interior Designer with a passion for design and procurement, we'd love to hear from you!

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Estimator and Scheduling Coordinator

Remote | Full-Time | US Business Hours

Industry: Construction (Countertop Fabrication and Installation)



About Our Company:

We are a growing company specializing in countertop fabrication and installation for both commercial and residential projects. Our team works closely across office, production, and field operations to ensure accurate estimates, smooth scheduling, and successful project completion.



Role Overview:

This role focuses on estimating, scheduling, and coordinating projects from start to finish.

You will review project plans, prepare accurate estimates, organize installation schedules, and maintain clear communication with clients and internal teams.



Process flow: Estimate to Proposal to Schedule to Installation to Follow-up



Key Responsibilities:

- Review construction drawings and perform quantity takeoffs

- Prepare detailed estimates using company tools

- Coordinate installation schedules with field teams

- Communicate timelines with clients and partners

- Update job information in the company CRM system

- Help prevent errors by confirming project scope early



Requirements:

- Experience reading construction drawings

- Background in estimating (construction, cabinetry, stone, or similar)

- Strong math and problem-solving skills

- Good communication skills

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Available to work during US business hours



Preferred Qualifications:

- Bilingual in English and Spanish

- Experience in countertop or stone-related projects

- Familiarity with estimating or project management software

- Experience using CRM systems



Why Join Us:

- Work closely with a supportive team

- Play an important role in project success

- Opportunity to grow with the company

- Stable remote position



How to Apply:

If you are detail-oriented and enjoy coordinating projects, we would love to hear from you. Please submit your application!

title: Video edito
description:
Video Editor

Important Language Requirement



All videos will be created in Spanish.



The video editor must be comfortable working with Spanish-language content, including Spanish voice-overs, Spanish subtitles, and Spanish on-screen text.



The final videos must sound natural, clear, and professional for a Spanish-speaking audience.



Overview



Create high-performing video ads for paid campaigns. Work closely with the Creative Strategist to produce both short-form and long-form videos, up to 5 minutes, for Meta platforms,
 and Instagram. Deliver approximately 10 videos per week.



Responsibilities



Edit performance-focused video ads for Meta platforms.

Follow provided scripts while adding strong creative execution.

Transform scripts, briefs, and references into engaging video content.

Capture attention with compelling hooks within the first 1–3 seconds.

Create Spanish-language videos with Spanish subtitles, Spanish voice-overs, and Spanish on-screen text.

Utilize AI tools such as ElevenLabs, Creatify, and other AI applications as needed.

Optimize edits continuously based on performance insights.

Communicate proactively if instructions or assets are unclear or incomplete.



Day-to-Day Tasks



Edit videos using provided raw footage, scripts, or AI-generated assets.

Execute edits closely aligned with scripts while enhancing visual appeal.

Produce multiple variations: hooks, pacing, captions, and endings.

Add Spanish captions, text animations, sound effects, music, and Spanish voice-overs.

Generate Spanish voice-overs using ElevenLabs when necessary.

Leverage Creatify and other AI tools to improve production speed.

Track video progress and status in a shared Google Sheet.

Implement revisions based on feedback from the Creative Team.



Qualifications



2–3+ years of video editing experience, experience with paid ads preferred.

Strong knowledge of short-form and long-form ad performance.

Hands-on experience editing ads for Meta,
 and Instagram.

Ability to follow scripts while maintaining creative execution.

Comfortable creating Spanish-language video ads, including Spanish subtitles and Spanish voice-overs.

Familiarity with AI tools such as ElevenLabs, Heygen, or similar, and editing software like CapCut.

title: Luxury Airbnb Cohost
description:
Luxury Airbnb Co-Host & Guest Experience Manager

Remote | Part-Time | Ongoing Contract

3 Luxury Properties — Austin, TX & Southern California





About the Role

We manage a portfolio of three high-end short-term rental properties and are looking for a reliable, hospitality-minded co-host to serve as the primary point of contact for our guests — from inquiry through checkout. This is an ongoing role requiring consistency, professionalism, and strong communication skills.







Responsibilities



 • Manage all guest communications across three Airbnb listings from inquiry to post-stay review



 • Respond to booking inquiries promptly to maximize conversion and maintain Superhost response metrics



 • Handle guest questions, check-in guidance, mid-stay requests, and any issues that arise during a stay



 • Upon each new booking or schedule change, immediately coordinate with our cleaning staff to schedule or adjust turnovers



 • Download and operate our pool control software to manage pool and jacuzzi heating remotely, adjusting temperatures per each guest’s requests and arrival timing



 • Coordinate with the property owner on escalations, maintenance needs, or special requests



 • Maintain a warm, professional tone that reflects the luxury positioning of all three properties





Coverage & Availability

We have one property in Austin, Texas (Central Time) and two properties in Southern California (Pacific Time). You must be available to respond to guests and booking inquiries during waking hours across both time zones — typically 7 AM CT to 10 PM PT. Same-day response times are expected for all guest-facing communications.





Requirements:



 • Fluent in both English and Spanish (required — Spanish is used daily to communicate with our cleaning team)



 • Prior experience as an Airbnb co-host, property manager, or short-term rental operator



 • Excellent written and verbal communication with a warm, professional tone



 • Ability to download and use a smart home/pool control app on your personal device



 • Proactive and reliable — guests should never feel like they’re waiting



 • Ability to de-escalate issues calmly and problem-solve independently



 • Familiarity with Airbnb’s host dashboard, resolution center, and messaging system



 • Strong organizational skills to manage three properties with overlapping bookings







Bonus Points

 • Experience managing luxury or high-value short-term rentals

 • Familiarity with tools like Hospitable, Guesty, or similar PMS platforms

 • Knowledge of the Austin or Southern California short-term rental market





How to Apply

Please include a brief introduction, a summary of your co-host or property management experience, confirmation that you are fluent in both English and Spanish, and your typical daily availability across time zones.

title: Video Sound Designer

• Experience in video sound design or audio editing

Preferred (Not Required):

Work Setup:

How to Apply

title: CRO Specialist — Shopify DTC (Intermediate!!)
description:
We're a digital health brand selling wellness guides into German-speaking and English markets. Our funnel is alive — new creatives every 3 days, new ads twice a week, traffic from multiple AI-generated avatar accounts across IG, FB, TikTok, and YouTube. The bottleneck isn't traffic. It's conversion.



That's where you come in.



---



**The mission:** Find where we're leaking money in the funnel. Fix it. Repeat.



**What that looks like week to week:**



- Diving into GA4, Shopify, and Meta data to find the biggest leakage points

- Designing and running A/B tests focused on the changes that actually move CVR and AOV — not micro-tweaks

- Building landing pages for every new ad batch (twice weekly cadence) that match the creative's promise and angle

- Proposing continuous improvements to the Shopify customer journey — PDP, cart, checkout, upsells, post-purchase

- Translating creative messaging into funnel messaging — when the hook changes, you make sure the LP, headlines, and copy stay coherent



**You're the right fit if:**



- You can read analytics fluently and tell a story from the numbers — this is non-negotiable

- You understand customer psychology: why people click, hesitate, abandon, and buy

- You're already working with Claude, Manus, or similar AI tools in your daily workflow

- You understand
 creatives well enough to know which angle is being pulled and how to extend it down the funnel

- You're intermediate — you've done this for at least one DTC Shopify brand running paid traffic, ideally in health/wellness or a similar emotional-buy category

- You operate independently. You don't wait for direction. You see a problem, propose a solution, ship it.



**Not a fit if:**



- You're a beginner looking to learn on the job

- You need detailed briefs for every task

- You only do strategy decks and don't ship



**To apply:**



Send a short Loom showing one CRO win you've actually delivered (numbers required), your rate, and one specific test you'd run on our site in week one. That's it.

title: Full Time Marketing Manager
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Full-time Marketing Manager

We are looking for a highly capable and hardworking Marketing Manager who is fluent in English and able to work full-time (8 hours per day).

AI Gurus Group, acquires traditional service companies in the Australia and the UK. We focus on implementing Ai-driven improvements in marketing automation, lead generation systems, operational automation and efficiencies. Initially we are acquiring, Accountancy Practices, Clean Energy/Solar and Property Management companies.

We are seeking a full-time Marketing Manager consultant to work remotely from home (Philippines).

This is a hands-on role focused on building and managing Go-High-level, our marketing systems, CRM workflows and automated lead generation processes.

You will play a key role in developing a structured “Lead Generation Machine” using CRM, automation and AI-supported marketing processes.



Hours

This is a full-time role working 8 paid hours per day, Monday to Friday, with a 1-hour unpaid lunch break.

The working day is:

11:30am – 8:30pm Philippines Time

Lunch break: 3:30pm – 4:30pm Philippines Time

This gives us daily working overlap with both Australia and the UK:

• Sydney, Australia: 1:30pm – 5:30pm 

• United Kingdom: 9:30am – 1:30pm 



Working Days:

Monday to Friday — 40 paid hours per week









IT Systems Set-Up

• Reliable internet and electricity 

• Good quality PC or laptop 

• Microsoft 365 familiarity 

• ChatGPT subscription required 



Daily Communication

• Daily communication via video,
, WhatsApp 

• Timeproof tracking 

• End-of-day reporting 



Pay and Payment Process

• $6 USD per hour 

• Paid monthly via PayPal / EasyPay 

• Contractor responsible for fees and setup 

Performance bonus + 13th month bonus after 12 months.



Description of Scope of Works

To build and manage a fully systemised, high-performing automated marketing machine.

The main focus of the role is CRM (Go-High-level) management, including building and optimising funnels, pipelines, workflows, campaigns, integrations and automated follow-up systems.

You will be responsible for managing the full customer journey from initial enquiry through to conversion, ensuring leads are captured, tracked, nurtured and moved efficiently through the pipeline.

This includes managing data quality, lead flow distribution, segmentation,
 campaigns, automation sequences and CRM reporting.

A key responsibility is improving organic website performance and structure to support both traditional search and AI-driven discovery, including optimisation for ChatGPT-style search and Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO).

You will work to align websites, landing pages, CRM systems and automated communication into a single, efficient marketing and sales process.

Continuous improvement is essential, identifying bottlenecks and improving conversion rates across the funnel.



Home Working Environment

Quiet, dedicated workspace with reliable connection and equipment required.



What Happens Next

We are looking for someone reliable, organised and commercially aware who can build systems that deliver measurable results.

When applying, tell us who you admire most in business and why.



Skill Requirements

• CRM Management (Go-High-Level preferred) 

• Marketing Automation 

• Funnel Building 

• Lead Generation Systems 

• Digital Marketing

title: Grant Writer
description:
Who We Are



Feathers Project is a non-profit dedicated to finding the poorest of the poor in the Philippines, those who have fallen through the cracks—people living in dire conditions without any other form of assistance. Our mission is to ensure “100% direct charity”. We do this with a small team that goes into the most poverty darkened communities in search of those in the greatest need of charity, and we provide the sponsors’ donations to them—directly.



Feathers Project is mostly funded by partner companies whose employees become volunteers to ensure integrity in the process. We emphasize disciplined processes, transparency, and audits to ensure that we do not wander from the mission.



What You’ll Do – Position Summary:



The Grant Writer will play a key role in securing funding to support Feathers Project’s mission of delivering “100% direct charity” to underserved communities in the Philippines. As a Grant Writer, you will directly contribute to expanding Feathers Project’s reach and strengthening its programs by securing funding from local and international donors. Your work will enable the organization to scale its initiatives, improve community outcomes, and build long-term impact.



Responsibilities:



Research and identify grant opportunities from Philippine government agencies (e.g., DOH, DSWD), local foundations, NGOs, and international funding bodies



Develop and write high-quality grant proposals, including narratives, budgets, and supporting documents



Create and manage a grant calendar to track deadlines, submissions, and reporting requirements



Collaborate with internal teams to gather program data, impact stories, and operational details



Maintain accurate records of grant applications, funding status, and compliance requirements



Build and maintain relationships with funders, partners, and stakeholders



Prepare grant reports and impact updates for donors



Ensure all submissions align with Hey Dan’s mission, programs, and strategic priorities



Stay updated on funding trends in the Philippines, particularly in nonprofit, community development, and digital initiatives



Support monitoring and evaluation efforts to strengthen funding proposals



Assist in developing fundraising materials (decks, concept notes, donor briefs)



Goal: To generate an average of 250,000 php in grant funding per month



Skills & Experience:



At least 3–5 years of successful experience in grant writing, fundraising, or nonprofit development



Preferred, but not required: Bachelor’s degree in Communications, English, Development Studies, Public Health, or a related field



Proven success in securing grants totalling over 750,000 php in one calendar year



Strong writing, editing, and research skills with attention to detail



Familiarity with the Philippine nonprofit and funding landscape



Excellent organizational and time management skills



Strong communication skills



Ability to translate program data into compelling, donor-friendly narratives



Experience with grant tracking tools or CRM systems is a plus







How to Apply: 

To be considered, please complete the following: (Note: If the links below are not clickable, please copy and paste them directly into your browser's address bar.)



Fill out the Candidate Form: 



Complete the English Test: 



If you encounter any technical errors accessing these links, please reach out to us at 
 for assistance.



Note: We prioritize applicants who complete all steps and provide full responses. Incomplete applications might not progress in the screening process.

title: Full Time Social Media LinkedIn Specialist
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Full-time Social Media, LinkedIn & Advertising Specialist

We are looking for an exceptional Social Media, LinkedIn and Advertising Specialist who is hardworking, fluent in English and able to work full-time (8 hours per day).

AI Gurus Group, acquires traditional service companies in the Australia and the UK. We focus on implementing Ai-driven improvements in marketing automation, lead generation systems, operational automation and efficiencies. Initially we are acquiring, Accountancy Practices, Clean Energy/Solar and Property Management companies.

We are seeking a full-time Marketing Manager consultant to work remotely from home (Philippines).

This is a hands-on role focused so a deep understanding of Go-High-level to manage automated processes, LinkedIn Sales Navigator and LinkedIn is required.

This is not a basic posting role. We are looking for someone with strong commercial understanding who can create, manage and optimise content and paid campaigns that generate real enquiries and measurable return on investment.

You will work across two businesses:

• AI Gurus Group – AI, automation and business growth 

• Clean Energy Gurus – solar, batteries, EV charging and energy solutions 



Hours

This is a full-time role working 8 paid hours per day, Monday to Friday, with a 1-hour unpaid lunch break.

11:30am – 8:30pm Philippines Time

Daily Communication

, WhatsApp

• $4 USD per hour 

• Paid monthly via PayPal / EasyPay 

• Contractor covers fees and equipment 

Performance-based bonus + 13th month bonus after 12 months.



Description of Scope of Works

To build strong brand awareness, engagement and lead generation through social media, LinkedIn and paid advertising campaigns.

The main focus of the role is to create, manage and optimise content and campaigns across LinkedIn,
, Instagram and Meta platforms. This includes building content calendars, writing high-quality posts, and ensuring consistent, professional output that reflects strong commercial positioning.

You will be responsible for developing and executing paid advertising campaigns that generate leads, enquiries and measurable ROI. This includes testing creatives, messaging, audiences and offers to continuously improve performance.

A key part of the role is building LinkedIn presence for both company and founder profiles, including content strategy, posting, engagement and outreach support. You will also help turn business insights, case studies and market opportunities into compelling content.

You will contribute to Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO), ensuring content is structured in a way that improves visibility in AI-driven search environments.

Tracking performance and improving results is essential. You will monitor engagement, cost per lead and campaign effectiveness, making ongoing improvements based on data.





Home Working Environment

What Happens Next

We are looking for someone commercially aware, proactive and reliable who takes pride in producing work that generates real results.
