title: Business Development / Outbound Sales – Construction (High Volume Calls)
description:
Loom resume link required for application. Please provide a link. 



---



**About Us**



We are an Australian construction and labour hire company supplying skilled formwork carpenters, concreters, and riggers to major projects across Western Australia. We are building a high-performance outbound team and need a driven Business Development professional to generate new client opportunities.



---



**The Role**



This is a high-volume outbound calling role. Your job is simple: call construction companies, find the decision-makers, and book meetings for our director. That's it.





**What You'll Be Doing**



- Make 50–100 outbound calls per day to construction companies

- Identify decision-makers (Project Managers, Site Managers, Procurement)

- Introduce our services clearly and confidently

- Book qualified meetings for the director

- Follow up leads consistently

- Maintain accurate notes and activity in CRM (e.g. HubSpot)

- General C-suite support and day-to-day tasks



---



**This role is about: Activity. Consistency. Results.**



You are responsible for creating pipeline and opportunities.



You are NOT responsible for closing deals, negotiating contracts, or managing clients long-term. Your job is getting meetings booked and pipeline flowing.



---



**Requirements (Non-Negotiable)**



- Confident, clear spoken English

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls daily

- Resilient — able to handle rejection and keep going

- Strong work ethic and personal accountability

- Previous experience in sales, outbound calling, or high ticket transactions/sales



---



**Preferred**



- Experience calling Australian businesses

- Construction or labour hire industry exposure

- Familiarity with CRM systems (HubSpot, etc.)



---



**Pay & Incentives**



- $5AUD per hour (based on experience, English proficiency, and industry background)

- Performance bonuses for meetings booked and attended

- Long-term opportunity within a growing company for the right performer



---



**How to Apply**



To be considered, you MUST:



1. Confirm you can make 50–100 calls per day

2. Provide a short recording introducing yourself

3. Describe your outbound calling or sales experience



**Applications without a voice recording and call confirmation will not be considered.**



**Final Note**



This is a performance-driven role. We want someone who shows up every day, hits targets, and takes ownership. If you perform — there is strong long-term opportunity here.

title: Senior Specialist, Graphic & Web Design
description:
About Truegenics:

Truegenics Pte Ltd is a leading e-commerce company based in Singapore with a track record of over US$218M in online product sales. We specialize in e-retailing our own brand of health supplements to a global audience.

We strive to create value and make a positive difference in the world, one life at a time. We believe that even the smallest action can define one’s destiny, and we are committed to creating products that enhance the lives of our consumers.



Why This Role Matters:

We are looking for a Senior Graphic & Web Designer who is passionate about creating meaningful brand experiences. Someone who combines creativity with technical precision and takes full ownership of their work.

You will be the visual voice of our brands, shaping how our products look, feel, and perform across packaging and web experiences. This is a fully remote role, so clear communication, strong collaboration, and accountability are key to your success.

You will partner closely with the marketing, copywriting, and sales teams to create designs that not only look exceptional but also deliver measurable results, driving conversions, strengthening brand reputation, and deepening customer loyalty.



Mission of the Role:

To elevate Truegenics’ visual identity across all touchpoints by ensuring every design supports business objectives, reinforces brand integrity, and resonates with our target audience.

As a senior creative, you will lead by example, maintaining design excellence, guiding junior tea
mbers, and setting high standards for creativity, performance, and consistency across all brands.



Key Responsibilities:



Graphic & Packaging Design (30%)

- Conceptualize and execute creative ideas for digital and packaging projects based on brand direction, marketing briefs, and - customer experience principles.

- Design and adapt packaging across product lines using established brand templates, ensuring consistency while introducing fresh variations for new launches.

- Create digital design assets for websites, social media,
s, and campaigns that engage users and drive conversions.

- Maintain a strong and consistent visual identity across all design outputs, ensuring alignment with brand guidelines and marketing objectives.

- Develop and evolve key brand visuals including logos, icons, color systems, typography, and layout frameworks.

- Translate marketing strategies into visually compelling campaigns that strengthen brand equity and support sales growth.

- Mentor and guide junior designers, providing clear feedback and creative direction to improve quality and efficiency.

- Research and incorporate emerging design trends, creative formats, and audience insights to keep the brand relevant and competitive.



Web Design & Frontend Development (70%)

- Design and develop responsive, high-performing web pages with a strong mobile-first approach, ensuring layouts, navigation, and performance are optimized for mobile users.

- Collaborate with marketing, media, and copywriting teams to design and optimize eCommerce landing pages that convert effectively across devices.

- Apply UX/UI best practices to build layouts that are visually engaging, intuitive to navigate, and optimized for performance.

- Develop reusable page templates and modular design systems to improve speed, consistency, and scalability.

- Ensure all web assets meet quality standards for responsiveness, accessibility, and loading performance.

- Coordinate the execution of promotional web materials, ensuring accuracy, brand consistency, and timely delivery.

- Review and refine the work of junior designers, providing constructive feedback that enhances both creative quality and execution.



Key Requirements:

- Strong portfolio showcasing both digital and web design work. Clear examples of mobile-first design projects will be a plus.

- Expertise in responsive and mobile UX/UI design, including optimizing layouts, images, and performance for smaller screens.

- Experience using AI tools to streamline creative processes, generate ideas, or enhance productivity (for example, generating layout variations, assisting with copy, or automating production tasks).

- Willingness to learn, explore, and adopt new AI tools to improve design quality and efficiency.

- Excellent communication skills and the ability to present ideas, feedback, and updates clearly in a remote, cross-functional environment.

- Self-driven, highly organized, and accountable to deadlines.

- Skilled in managing multiple projects while maintaining attention to detail.

- Comfortable collaborating through digital tools and workflows such as Figma, Slack, and Wrike.



Working Arrangement:

This is a fully remote position, open to candidates who can collaborate effectively across digital platforms and time zones.

The potential hire must also be equipped with the following to carry out this role effectively:

- Laptop / CPU with acceptable speed

- At least 1 monitor screen (inclusive of laptop screen)

- Headset with Mic (Noise cancelling)

- Webcam

- Designated Workstation

- Stable and strong power and internet connectivity

- Noise-free and conducive environment



Salary:

[To be discussed based on experience]

title: Outbound Sales & Client Relations VA — Luxury Construction (Architectural Plaster)
description:
About Us

Architectural Plaster is a high-end specialty plastering and stucco company based in the Coachella Valley, California. We work with architects, interior designers, and luxury residential developers on custom projects that require craftsmanship and attention to detail. We’re a tight-knit, professional team that takes care of our people and our clients. We’re growing fast and looking for the right person to grow with us.





The Role

We’re hiring a part-time Outbound Sales & Client Relations VA to help us build relationships with architects, designers, and luxury residential developers — and keep our pipeline full. This is not a cold-calling script job. This is relationship-building, personalized outreach, and smart follow-up with high-end professionals who appreciate being approached with care and professionalism.

You’ll start at 20 hours per week with strong potential to grow into a full-time role as the business scales.





What You’ll Be Doing

 • Researching and identifying target prospects — architects, interior designers, luxury home builders, and developers in the high-end residential market

 • Sending personalized outreach
s and LinkedIn messages introducing Architectural Plaster and our work

 • Following up consistently and professionally with warm leads

 • Maintaining and updating our CRM with contact history, project notes, and follow-up schedules

 • Flagging warm leads and active project opportunities to the owner immediately

 • Coordinating with our Bidding Specialist to hand off qualified leads and share client intel

 • Drafting professional client communications and correspondence on behalf of the owner

 • Assisting with invoicing and client follow-up as the role grows





Bonus Skills We’d Love

 • Experience with marketing, content creation, or graphic design

 • Ability to create marketing materials such as brochures, project flyers, and capability decks showcasing our work

 • Familiarity with Canva or similar design tools

 • Social media management or portfolio presentation experience





You’re the Right Fit If You…

 • Write in clear, professional, natural English — no templates, no robotic
s

 • Are highly organized and self-directed — you manage your own follow-up without being chased

 • Take pride in representing a brand well

 • Have experience in sales outreach, client relations, or business development

 • Are comfortable reaching out cold and turning it warm through genuine relationship-building

 • Are reliable, consistent, and communicate proactively





Details

 • Hours: 20 hours per week to start

 • Rate: $6.50–$8.00/hour depending on experience

 • Schedule: Flexible, with availability for a regular check-in with the owner

 • Location: Remote / Work from home





How to Apply

Please submit your application with the following:

 1. Your updated resume or profile

 2. A 2-minute video introduction answering this question: “Walk me through how you would approach your first two weeks in this role — what would you do to start building our pipeline?”

Applications without a video submission will not be reviewed. We’re looking for someone who reads the full job description, takes the application seriously, and shows us who they really are. That person gets the job.

title: Expert Crochet Pattern Designer (Pattern Fixing & Reconstruction)
description:
Job Description:



We are looking for an experienced Crochet Pattern Designer who can fix, validate, and rebuild crochet patterns so they accurately produce the finished item shown.



We are currently dealing with patterns that are causing customer issues due to unclear instructions and technical inaccuracies. Your role will be to identify problems and turn them into clean, professional, fully followable patterns.



This is not a formatting or VA role — we need someone who understands crochet and knitting construction, stitch logic, and pattern accuracy.



What You’ll Do:

- Review existing crochet patterns and identify errors or inconsistencies

- Fix unclear or incorrect instructions

- Rewrite patterns so they are fully followable and accurate

- Ensure the final pattern can realistically produce the intended item

- Structure patterns in a clean, professional format



What We’re Looking For:

- Proven experience creating or correcting crochet patterns

- Strong understanding of garment construction (panels, sleeves, shaping, sizing)

- Ability to detect technical issues (stitch counts, shaping errors, inconsistencies)

- Ability to write clear, precise, step-by-step instructions

- High attention to detail



Important:

We are specifically looking for someone who can fix broken patterns, not just write or format them.



Assessment (Required):



To be considered, you must have a portfolio and complete a short test:

1. Review a sample crochet pattern

2. Identify:

- Errors, unclear instructions, or inconsistencies

- Technical issues that may prevent the pattern from producing the intended item

3. Choose one section (front panel or sleeves) and:

- Rewrite it into a clean, fully followable pattern

- Include clear stitch counts and precise instructions

- Ensure it can realistically be executed



To Apply:



Please include:

- A short introduction about your crochet pattern experience

- Samples or portfolio of patterns you’ve created or corrected

- Confirmation that you’re willing to complete the assessment



Work Setup:

- Project-based (with potential for long-term work)

- Flexible hours

- Ongoing work available for the right candidate



Note:

Applications without relevant crochet pattern experience will not be considered.

title: Square.com eCommerce & Messaging Integration Specialist
description:

eCommerce Optimization: Fine-tune our Square Online store layout, ensuring SEO best practices and mobile responsiveness.

Messaging Setup: Configure Square Messages to handle inquiries, automated replies, and appointment/order notifications.

Integration: Connect Instagram/Facebook messaging to the Square Inbox to centralize customer interactions.

Inventory Sync: Ensure real-time syncing between the messaging platform and the store catalog so customers can buy directly through chat.

Workflow Automation: Set up automated triggers (e.g., abandoned cart reminders via SMS/Email or "Ready for Pickup" alerts).

Detail Oriented: You don't just "set it and forget it"—you test the flows to ensure no customer gets stuck in a loop.

Bonus: Experience with Square Marketing or loyalty program integration.

Project Scope & Budget

A link to a Square Online store you’ve built or managed.

Your experience integrating messaging/SMS into a retail workflow.

Your favorite "hidden gem" feature in the Square ecosystem that most people overlook.

title: Stick Figure Animator / Video Editor for YouTube Channel — POV Storytelling Style (up to 15 min)
description:
About the Channel



We run a faceless YouTube channel built around cinematic POV-style storytelling — you are the character, you make the decisions, you live the story. Think Mr. Sticky meets documentary tension. Our scripts are second-person narratives that pull the viewer in from the first second and never let go.

We're building something real here, and we need an animator who can bring that energy to life visually.



What You'll Be Doing



Animate videos up to 15 minutes using a stick figure / simple cartoon style (similar to Mr. Sticky — see reference: ---------- /watch?v=xaA1xF8kxC8)

Work from a provided script and AI voiceover (we deliver both)

Sync visuals to narration with strong pacing and storytelling rhythm

Add sound effects and transitions that match the tension of the story

Deliver a final video ready for YouTube upload





What We Provide



Full script (every video)

AI voiceover in WAV format (every video)

Reference channels and a visual style guide

Clear, fast feedback — we don't ghost our editors





Who We're Looking For



Proven experience with stick figure or simple cartoon-style animation

Strong instinct for pacing — you understand that timing is the storytelling

Any software works: Pivot, FlipaClip, After Effects, Adobe Animate, or whatever you're fastest in

Reliable. Deadlines matter to us.

Communicates well in English

Portfolio required — please do not apply without sample work





Pay & Growth Potential

The starting rate is $33 per completed video (up to 15 minutes).

I want to be upfront — I know that's not a top-of-market rate. But here's the honest pitch: this channel is built to grow, and when it becomes profitable, the rate per video goes up with it. I'm not looking for a one-time hire. I'm looking for someone who wants to build something together and get paid more as we win more.

If you're talented, reliable, and want to grow with a channel from the ground up — this is that opportunity.



Paid via PayPal after delivery and approval

Starts with 1 test video

Recurring role immediately if the fit is right (4–8 videos/month)

Rate increases as the channel scales





How to Apply

Send a message with:



Portfolio link — stick figure or simple cartoon animation (required)

Short intro — who you are, what tools you use, how fast you work

Availability — how many videos per month can you handle?



Use the subject line: POV Animator — applications without this will not be read.

Working Format

Remote work.

Compensation

Engagement Terms

This role is offered as an independent contractor / freelance cooperation.

Remote work only.

title: Senior Amazon FBA Wholesale Operations VA — Part-Time, Long-Term
description:
I run an established US-based Amazon FBA wholesale store and need a senior part-time operations VA to manage day-to-day operations and supplier relationships while I focus on sourcing strategy and capital decisions.

The store has a proven product flow but is currently rebuilding inventory after recent sell-through. I'm not running high volume — yet — and I'm hiring this role to scale carefully, not aggressively.



Hours: Part-time, ~15-20 hrs/week. Some overlap with US business hours preferred but flexible. You can have other clients.

Rate: $5/hr paid weekly via Wise or PayPal.

Start: Within 1-2 weeks of selection.

Length: Long-term role. I'm hiring once and want this to last 12+ months.



What I bring to the role

I've built a custom sourcing platform that handles the heaviest lift: it scans Amazon daily for qualified products, applies a rules engine to filter them, and feeds a priority-sorted list of brands worth pursuing. You don't do product research from scratch — you start with a curated brand list.

I handle: sourcing system maintenance, supplier payment, opening order approvals, capital decisions, final negotiation sign-off.

You handle: everything between brand-on-the-list and product-in-Amazon.



What you'll do

Supplier discovery (~35% of time):

Work from a Google Sheet of priority-sorted brands my system generates. For each brand, find authorized US wholesale distributors. You bring the expertise — you know how to identify dealer networks, vet authorization claims, and tell a real distributor from a competitor or scam. I provide an SOP that defines how I want findings recorded (data fields, red-flag conventions, how to flag Amazon-restriction language) so the output integrates cleanly with my system. Up to 3 supplier candidates per brand: name, website, contact info, MOQ, restrictions, notes.

Supplier outreach and relationship management (~25% of time):

You'll have a dedicated
 address 
 and own outreach end-to-end. Initial outreach, follow-ups, supplier intake questions, and ongoing relationship maintenance once a supplier is approved. Notify me on WhatsApp when a new supplier expresses interest before you reply, so we align on tone for the first response.

Negotiation within guardrails (~10% of time):

You communicate directly with suppliers during pricing and term discussions — I don't want to be in those conversations. You negotiate freely on lead time, shipping, reorder cadence, dispute resolution, and standard back-and-forth.

These escalate to me for explicit approval before you respond:



Pricing and discount commitments

MOQs and opening order size

Payment terms (net-30, prepay, deposits)

MAP commitments

Restrictions on sales channel or geography



I respond fast — typically within 1-2 hours during US business hours. The structure: you propose, I approve, you communicate. You're the voice; I'm the wallet.



Order coordination (~15% of time, growing):

Once I approve and fund an order, you place the PO, coordinate with my prep center via a WhatsApp group (you'll be added with me and the prep center), track delivery and inspection, and create the FBA inbound shipment plan in Seller Central. Handle exceptions — resolve what you can, escalate what you can't.



Store operations (~15% of time):

Day-to-day Seller Central tasks via sub-user access (operational permissions only — no banking or account settings): customer messages, return requests, suppressed listing fixes, account health monitoring, MAP violation reports, basic A-to-Z claim responses.

Escalate to me within hours, not days: IP complaints, suspension threats, brand authorization requests, anything that affects account standing.



Operational rhythm

Communication: WhatsApp for everything — day-to-day ops, negotiation approvals, weekly status, prep center coordination (in a separate group thread).

Weekly status: Brief Monday summary on WhatsApp — brands researched, suppliers contacted, replies handled, orders placed, dollars deployed, issues to flag.

Response expectations from me: 1-2 hours during US business hours for negotiation approvals; 4-6 hours for non-urgent decisions.

Response expectations from you: Within 24 hours during your working days for non-urgent supplier
s; WhatsApp messages acknowledged within 4 hours during your working hours.

I'm not expecting always-on coverage — this is part-time. Anything genuinely urgent that hits while you're off-shift, I'll handle.



What you need to have

Required:



- 3+ years hands-on Amazon Seller Central experience, US marketplace

- Direct wholesale FBA experience — not arbitrage, not private label, not dropshipping. You know what an authorized distributor relationship looks like, you understand MOQs/MAP/dealer applications, and you can spot a fake "wholesaler" from a real one.

- Experience negotiating with US suppliers via
 or phone — comfortable proposing terms, asking for concessions, reading between the lines of supplier responses

- Strong written English — your
s represent the brand to US suppliers

- Reliable computer, 20+ Mbps internet

- Comfort with structured workflows: Google Sheets, WhatsApp, documented SOPs



Strongly preferred:



- Track record identifying and vetting US authorized distributors (not Alibaba/AliExpress/dropship)

- Familiarity with Amazon brand gating, ungating, and which brand types are accessible to small wholesale resellers

- Experience with US prep centers and creating FBA inbound shipments

- Familiarity with Keepa (you don't need to operate it — my system does — but you should know what it shows).



Nice to have, not required:



- Helium 10, Sellerboard, or similar tooling familiarity

- Prior experience in a setup where automation handles discovery and the human owns relationships



What this role is not



- Product research. My system handles it.

- Final negotiation authority. I approve any pricing, MOQ, or term commitment before you respond.

- Always-on store ops. Part-time hours; urgent issues outside your hours come to me.

- Private label or arbitrage operations. Wholesale only.



How to apply

Send a message including:



- Wholesale FBA experience. Specific clients/brands you've worked with on wholesale (not arbitrage). How did you find their suppliers? What tools/processes did you use?

- One concrete example of a supplier relationship you helped onboard — what brand, how you found them, what made you confident they were legitimate.

- One example of a supplier negotiation you handled — what you were negotiating, what you asked for, how it landed.

- Your current client load. How many active clients? Are you available for ~30 hrs/week of dedicated time on my account?

- Hourly or weekly rate if different from my offer.

- Your timezone and typical work hours.



I respond within 48 hours to candidates I want to talk to. Generic copy-paste applications go to the bottom of the pile. I read every word. Have a wonderful day!

About the Role

We are looking for a proactive, organised and digitally savvy Marketing VA to join our small remote team. This is a part time role of approximately 25 hours per month to start, with strong potential to grow to full time as the business scales.

You will be the engine behind our lead generation and contractor network. Your work directly feeds our Sales VA with warm leads and referral enquiries — making your role critical to the growth of the business. You will also be responsible for setting up and managing our GoHighLevel CRM system.



What You Will Be Doing

* Managing and growing our Instagram and
 presence with consistent, engaging content aimed at UK homeowners

 to introduce our referral partnership

* Setting up and managing our GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM system including pipelines, automations and follow up sequences

* Communicating and coordinating daily with our Sales VA to pass warm leads and referral enquiries

* Submitting a brief weekly activity report every Friday



Essential Skills

* Excellent written English — you will be writing outreach
s and social content for a UK audience

* Experience in social media management — Instagram and
 essential

* Experience in B2B outreach — cold
 or outreach to businesses

* SEO basics — on-page optimisation, meta descriptions, keyword awareness

* Highly organised with strong attention to detail

* Self-motivated and able to work independently

* Reliable internet connection and availability during UK business hours



Desirable

* GoHighLevel (GHL) experience

* Experience working with UK based clients

* Canva or basic graphic design skills

* Experience with contractor, construction or home improvement industries

What We Offer

* $200-300/month depending on experience (25 hours/month)

* Fully remote and flexible

* Long term position with strong growth potential

* Full training materials and onboarding programme provided

* Performance bonus based on contractor network engagement rates



How to Apply

Please send a short voice or video introduction — maximum 2 minutes — telling us why you are the right person for this role. Also include your CV and any examples of previous social media or outreach work. Applications without a voice or video introduction will not be considered.

title: Account Executive - Sales
description:
Xiren Sites is a US-based productized web design subscription for small service businesses. We sell a $100/month plan; fully built site, ongoing edits, hosting included. We're scaling outbound and need a closer who can pick up the phone and run cold to close.



The Role

You're cold calling US small business owners and closing them on a $100/month subscription. Our typical motion is a 2-call close: discovery call ? close call. You own the full cycle from dial to signed.



Make outbound cold calls during US business hours

Run discovery, set close calls, run close calls, get the card

Manage your own pipeline and follow-ups in our CRM

We provide a starting lead list; you can also source your own

Hit a daily dial / talk-time minimum (set during onboarding)



You can offer up to a $25 discount to close... your call as the closer.



Compensation

Realistic OTE: $1,200–1,800/month for solid performers. Top closers go higher.

Paid Bi-Weekly via Wise.



Hours

Full-time, 40 hours/week. Must overlap US Pacific business hours (roughly 8am–5pm PT). You're cold calling US owners — your day runs on their clock.



You're a fit if you have:

1+ year of cold calling experience, B2B preferred

Near-native spoken English — clients will judge you in 5 seconds

Thick skin: cold calling is rejection volume, you need to handle it

Comfort with price objections, "we already have a website," "send me an
," and the gatekeeper

Self-motivated and disciplined on dial volume

Quiet workspace, fast wired internet, USB headset, working webcam

Familiarity with a dialer and a CRM



Bonus points:

Sold to US small business owners (HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, salons, contractors, etc.)

Web design, marketing, or agency sales background

Track record of consistent monthly close numbers



How to apply

Read carefully — applicants who skip steps are auto-rejected:



Start your reply with the word "Xiren" so I know you read this.

Record a 60–90 second Loom or video with: (a) a 30-second cold pitch as if you just got the owner of a small landscaping company on the phone selling a $100/mo website, (b) walk me through the toughest objection you've handled and how you closed.

Tell me your average daily dial count at your last role.

Tell me your availability in US Pacific time.



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

* Respond instantly via SMS

* Book more jobs automatically



Before I start selling this service, I want to **learn how to build and implement this system myself**.



I am looking for a **GoHighLevel expert who can coach me 1-on-1 over Zoom** and teach me step-by-step.



---



**Important: Please Read Carefully**



This is NOT a “do it for me” job.



I am specifically looking for someone who can:



* Teach clearly

* Explain step-by-step

* Help me understand how to build the system myself



If you prefer doing the work instead of teaching, this is not the right fit.



---



**What I Need Help With (Core Focus Only):**



I am NOT trying to learn everything in GoHighLevel.



I only want to master a simple system that includes:



1. **Missed Call Text-Back**



   * Automatically text leads when a call is missed



2. **Speed-to-Lead Automation**



   * Instant SMS response after form submissions



3. **Basic Booking System**



   * Calendar setup + booking links

   * Confirmation and reminder messages



4. **Simple Follow-Up**



   * SMS follow-ups if leads don’t book



5. **Basic CRM Setup**



   * Pipelines and lead tracking



---



**How I Want to Learn:**



* 1-on-1 Zoom sessions (screen share required)

* Step-by-step walkthroughs

* Hands-on implementation (not theory)

* Clear explanations in English



---



**Requirements:**



* Strong experience with GoHighLevel

* Fluent and clear English communication

* Ability to teach simply and effectively

* Experience building systems for service businesses (preferred)

* Reliable internet and working camera/microphone



---



**Application Instructions:**



Before we schedule a Zoom call, please send a **short Loom video (3–5 minutes)** covering:



1. A quick introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with GoHighLevel

3. A simple explanation of how you would set up a **missed call text-back + booking system** for an HVAC business



This will help me understand your communication and teaching style.



---



**Opportunity:**



If we work well together, there is potential for **long-term work**, including helping me build systems for future clients as I grow.



---



**Goal:**



By the end of this, I want to:



* Confidently build this system myself

* Deliver it to HVAC businesses

* Turn it into a recurring service



---



Looking forward to your application.

title: SharePoint / Microsoft 365 Expert
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



About the Organization 



EJF Real Estate Services and The Nabo Group are growing organizations focused on real estate investment and property/HOA management across multiple regions. Our operations rely heavily on structured document management, secure collaboration, and scalable systems to support property portfolios, boards, and internal teams. 



We are undergoing a transformation to modernize and standardize our Microsoft 365 environment, with a strong focus on SharePoint Online, governance, and operational efficiency. 



Overview 



We are seeking an experienced SharePoint & Microsoft 365 Architect to design and implement a scalable, secure, and governance-driven collaboration environment tailored to a multi-entity real estate and property management organization within the Corporate IT Department. 



This role will focus on building a structured and standardized environment across SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, and Microsoft Entra ID, enabling efficient document management, controlled access, and future-ready AI and automation capabilities. 



The ideal candidate is a strategic architect, not just an administrator, with experience designing environments that support distributed teams, regional operations, and complex permission models.



Duties & Responsibilities:



Architecture & Design:

 

•  Design enterprise-grade SharePoint Online architecture aligned to:  

 -  Properties / communities (HOAs)  

 -  Regions / portfolios  

 -  Internal departments (Finance, Operations, Legal, etc.)  

•  Implement a hub-and-spoke model with clear hierarchy and navigation  

•  Define scalable information architecture:  

 -  Metadata vs folder structures  

 -  Content types and taxonomy  

 -  Standardized document libraries  

•  Establish site provisioning models and templates for repeatable property onboarding  

•  Align SharePoint with Microsoft Teams and OneDrive usage patterns  



Governance & Compliance:

 

•  Develop and document a SharePoint governance framework tailored to property management operations:  

 -  Naming conventions (properties, regions, departments)  

 -  Site lifecycle management (onboarding/offboarding properties)  

 -  Permission models (board members, internal staff, vendors)  

•  Implement data governance and compliance controls:  

 -  Retention policies for property records and financial documents  

 -  Sensitivity labels and secure document handling  

 -  External sharing controls for board members and third parties  

•  Ensure alignment with real estate and property management operational needs  



Microsoft 365 Integration:  



•  Architect seamless integration across:  

 -  SharePoint Online  

 -  Microsoft Teams (for property and internal collaboration)  

 -  OneDrive (personal vs organizational data boundaries)  

 -  Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) 

•  Design scalable identity and access strategies:  

 -  Role-based access (internal staff, board members, vendors)  

 -  Group-based provisioning  

 -  Conditional access awareness  



Automation & AI Readiness:

 

•  Structure SharePoint for Microsoft Copilot readiness (clean, well-organized data)  

•  Identify opportunities for:  

 -  Power Automate workflows (approvals, document routing, onboarding)  

 -  Process automation for property management operations  

•  Improve search, discoverability, and document intelligence  



Migration & Optimization:



•  Assess current SharePoint and file storage environments  

•  Identify gaps, duplication, and inefficiencies  

•  Develop a migration and consolidation strategy  

•  Optimize usability for both:  

 -  Internal teams  

 -  Non-technical users (property managers, board members)  



Documentation & Knowledge Transfer:

 

•  Deliver:  

 -  Architecture diagrams  

 -  Governance framework documentation  

 -  Implementation and rollout roadmap  

•  Provide knowledge transfer to internal IT leadership and support teams  





Required Qualifications:

 

•  5+ years of experience with SharePoint Online (modern experience required)  

•  5+ years across the Microsoft 365 ecosystem  

•  Proven experience designing enterprise or multi-entity SharePoint architectures  

•  Strong understanding of:  

 -  Microsoft Teams & SharePoint integration  

 -  Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)  

 -  Complex permission and access control models  

•  Experience with:  

 -  Metadata and taxonomy design  

 -  Governance frameworks  

 -  Scalable site provisioning strategies  





Preferred Qualifications:

 

•  Experience supporting property management, real estate, or HOA environments  

•  Experience with multi-entity or portfolio-based organizations  

•  Familiarity with:  

 -  Microsoft Purview (retention, compliance, labeling)  

 -  Power Platform (Power Automate, Power Apps)  

 -  Microsoft Copilot readiness and data structuring  

• Microsoft certifications (nice to have):  

 -  MS-100 / MS-101  

 -  MS-700  

 -  SharePoint / M365 certifications 



Working Hours: 9:00 am – 5:00 pm EST; Monday – Friday (US time zones)



Benefits: HMO and PTO after 90 days.



How to apply:

1. Please check out the company website before submitting an application: 
.

2. Send an
 attachment with your updated resume in PDF format.

3. Please indicate that you're hourly rate in USD..

4. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description, and include your OnlineJobs.PH profile link.



Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position SharePoint / Microsoft 365 Architect - your name.



*Applicants who will apply through onlinejobs.ph will not be considered.

*Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.

Looking forward to working with you!

title: Finance Manager with Property Management Experience
description:

Who We Are:



Tracing our history back to 1920, EJF Real Estate Services has been a family-owned and family-operated business for over 30 years, specializing in community association management and real estate sales across the Washington, DC metropolitan area. Today, we are the largest DC-based property management firm, proudly serving hundreds of clients throughout the DMV. Our extensive market knowledge, hands-on industry experience, and best-in-class customer service help communities thrive.

mbers and external clients (board members and association representatives).

etings, set goals, and complete assigned tasks on time.

title: Freight Broker Dispatcher / Virtual Assistant — Logistics Experience Required
description:
About Us

Imoto Logistics LLC is a licensed US freight brokerage based in Charlotte, North Carolina (MC#
). We connect shippers across the Southeast US with verified carriers and are building something exciting in logistics technology. We are a small, fast-moving startup and you will be a core part of the operation from day one.



What You Will Do

- Post loads on DAT load board

- Verify carrier authority, insurance, and safety rating via FMCSA SAFER

- Send and follow up on rate confirmations

- Conduct check calls on active loads

- Track shipments and update shippers on load status

- Prepare invoices and submit to our factoring company

- Onboard new carriers — collect packets, W-9, and direct deposit information

- Maintain and update our shipper and carrier database





What We Are Looking For

- Minimum 1 year experience in US freight brokerage or freight dispatching

- Familiar with DAT load board

- Understands FMCSA carrier verification process

- Strong written and spoken English

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

- Available during US business hours — Eastern Time preferred

- Comfortable starting part-time with the expectation of growing into a full-time role as our volume increases

- Detail-oriented, proactive, and honest





Nice to Have

- Experience with MVMNT or AscendTMS

- Familiarity with freight factoring companies such as OTR Solutions or Triumph





Growth Path

This role starts at 10–15 hours per week. As our load volume grows you will grow with us into a full-time position with expanded responsibilities. We are looking for someone who wants to build something long-term, not just fill hours.





How to Apply

Please respond with:

- A brief summary of your freight brokerage or dispatching experience

- The TMS or load board tools you have used

- Your available start date and weekly availability



Applications without relevant freight experience will not be considered.

title: Senior MSP Engineer
description:
This is not a basic helpdesk role. As our Senior MSP Engineer, you will serve as the final remote escalation point for all technical issues that cannot be resolved at the Tier 1/2 level. You own every ticket assigned to you — from first response through to resolution and documentation. Physical replacements and onsite dispatches are handled by our U.S.-based project team; your domain is everything that can be resolved remotely.



When you are not actively working tickets, your focus shifts to prevention: identifying recurring issues, building automations, improving documentation, and creating training resources that reduce ticket volume across the board.

Primary Responsibilities

Escalation & Ticket Ownership

• Serve as Tier 3 remote escalation for all client technical issues

• Take full ownership of assigned tickets — you drive them to resolution

• Communicate clearly and professionally with clients throughout the resolution process

• Escalate only when physical onsite service or hardware replacement is required (project team handles dispatch)

• Maintain SLA response and resolution targets: acknowledge within 15 minutes, first action within 30 minutes

Proactive Engineering & Automation

• Identify root causes of recurring tickets and drive permanent resolution

• Build and maintain automations using NinjaRMM, ImmyBot, PowerShell, and other scripting tools

• Develop and maintain runbooks, SOPs, and technical documentation in the team knowledge base

• Create end-user and internal training materials to reduce avoidable ticket volume

• Participate in regular review of monitoring alerts and patch status across the client base

Systems Administration

• Administer and troubleshoot Microsoft 365, Azure Active Directory, and Exchange Online environments

• Manage Windows Server infrastructure: Active Directory, Group Policy, DNS, DHCP

• Configure and troubleshoot network infrastructure: firewalls, switches, VLANs, VPNs

• Oversee and manage endpoint backup and disaster recovery platforms

• Support and administer security tools: endpoint protection, MFA, conditional access policies



Required Qualifications

• 5+ years of hands-on experience in an MSP environment (not corporate IT)

• Demonstrated experience with NinjaRMM (RMM platform administration, scripting, alerts)

• Experience with ImmyBot for software deployment and endpoint management

• Strong scripting ability in PowerShell; Python or Bash a plus

• Microsoft 365 and Azure AD administration — intermediate to advanced level

• Solid networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLANs, firewall rules, VPN

• Experience with Windows Server 2016/2019/2022 administration

• PSA/ticketing platform experience (ConnectWise, HaloPSA, Autotask, or similar)

• Excellent written and spoken English — client-facing communication is required

• Self-directed with strong ownership mentality — must be comfortable working independently

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a private, secure home office setup



Preferred Qualifications

• CompTIA Network+, Security+, or A+ certification

• Microsoft certifications: MD-102, AZ-104, or MS-102

• Experience with Datto, Veeam, or similar backup/DR platforms

• Experience with SonicWall, Fortinet, or Cisco networking equipment

• Familiarity with IT Glue, Passportal, or similar documentation/credential management platforms

• Prior experience working with U.S.-based MSP clients on EST schedule- VERY IMPORTANT

title: Scheduler
description:
Job description:



More Than Scheduling — Be the First Smile Our Patients Experience



Are you someone who loves connecting with people, building trust, and making a real difference—one conversation at a time?



As a Dental Scheduling Coordinator, you are much more than someone who books appointments. You are the voice, guide, and advocate for our patients from their very first call, helping them feel comfortable, informed, and confident about their dental care.



Every conversation you have can help a patient take an important step toward better health and a confident smile.



Why This Role Is Different



In this role, you will:



Build genuine connections with patients and make them feel heard

Educate and guide patients over the phone, helping them understand their dental needs and available treatments

Turn questions and concerns into trust and confidence

Help patients move forward with care that can improve their health and quality of life

Your communication skills will play a key role in helping patients say “yes” to the care they need.



What You’ll Do



Manage inbound and outbound calls to schedule dental appointments

Connect with new and existing patients in a friendly, confident, and professional manner

Educate patients about dental services and treatments, answering questions and helping them understand the value of care

Use ethical, persuasive communication to guide patients toward scheduling visits

Maintain accurate documentation in dental scheduling software

Confirm appointments and follow up with patients to maintain an efficient schedule

Work closely with clinical and administrative teams to create a seamless patient experience

What We’re Looking For



Dental office experience is REQUIRED

title: Real Estate VA for SMS Lead Management & CRM Follow Up
description:
I’m looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help manage SMS marketing campaigns and lead follow-up for my real estate business.



We use tools like Smarter Contact and Close CRM/GHL to generate and manage leads. Your role will be to organize responses, identify motivated sellers, and move leads through our pipeline.



This is a long-term opportunity if you perform well.
